ValidationRule.description: Because Credit Insurance Confirmation is Selected , Confirmation Bank Country Code cannot be empty!
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND(RecordType.DeveloperName ='LC', Credit_Insurance_Confirmation_Y_N__c =True,ISBLANK( Confirmed_Bank_Country_Code__c )), TRUE, FALSE)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: There is the Credit Insurance Confirmation,Confirmed Bank Country Code Cannot be Empty!
